entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
Read about Canadian history from 1800-1900 through biographies, primary source documents, history spines, and historical fiction. View images and reference atlases and maps to set the people and events in their time and place. Update History Charts and Book of Centuries.

This topic is included in the following course(s): History: Grades 11-12 (Canada)

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: This course is the same for Grade 11 and Grade 12.

rows.label: Canadian History: Grades 11-12

rows.books: A History of Canada in Ten Maps: Epic Stories of Charting a Mysterious Land, Early Voices, Making of Canada: An Epic History in Twenty Extraordinary Lives, How Different It Was: Canadians at the Time of Confederation, The Unweaving
